emergency_definition: downed power line tangled in trees — do NOT approach

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: have the crew lead text a status update to the customer within 1 hour

non_emergency_routing_rules: Take caller name, phone number, and message. Schedule callback during business hours.

emergency.fallback: have the crew lead text a status update to the customer within 1 hour

routing_rules.non_emergency: Take caller name, phone number, and message. Schedule callback during business hours.

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you. Can I take your name and number so someone can call you back shortly?

integration_constraints: never schedule tree removal jobs without a city permit number on file
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
greeting_style: Hey there, thanks for calling GreenScape! How can we make your yard look amazing today?
scheduling_preferences: batch estimates by neighborhood to save drive time, prefer Tuesday and Thursday for new consultations
follow_up_procedure: send a digital proposal within 24 hours of the estimate, then follow up by text 3 days later
other_tools: Aspire for estimating and LMN for time tracking
notes: current promotion is free spring cleanup (valued at $250) with any new annual lawn maintenance contract signed this month.
